Headline: #55 Garfield Temporary Westbound Reroute near 55th/Lake Park
ShortDescription: WB 55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Lake Park, 51st, Cottage Grove, 55th and over regular route, due to street blockage near 55th/Lake Park.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Lake Park, 51st, Cottage Grove, 55th and over regular route, due to street blockage near 55th/Lake Park.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #79 79th and #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Reroute near 79th/Cottage Grove
ShortDescription: #79 79th and #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted, due to police activity near 79th/Cottage Grove.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#79 79th and #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted, due to police activity near 79th/Cottage Grove.

#79 79th buses are rerouted in both directions:

Eastbound buses will operate via 79th, King Drive, 76th, Greenwood, 79th and over normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 79th, Greenwood, 76th, Cottage Grove, 79th and over normal route.

#4 Cottage Grove buses:

Northbound #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, 83rd, King Drive, 76th, Cottage Grove and over normal route.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Yellow Line Service Temporarily Suspended
ShortDescription: Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to an obstruction on the tracks. near Oakton.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to an obstruction on the tracks near Oakton.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines. 

These may include:

#97 Skokie

We are working to restore service as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between Howard and Thorndale
ShortDescription: Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between  Howard and Thorndale due to a medical emergency on the tracks at Jarvis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between  Howard and Thorndale due to a medical emergency on the tracks at Jarvis.

As a result, trains are operating only between 95th and Thorndale at this time.

Shuttle buses are available from Howard to Thorndale to provide connecting service through the affected area. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between Howard and Wilson
ShortDescription: Purple Line service has been temporarily suspended between Howard and Wilson due to a medical emergency on the tracks at Jarvis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Purple Line service has been temporarily suspended between Howard and Wilson due to a medical emergency on the tracks at Jarvis.

As a result, trains are operating only between Wilson and Washington/Wells at this time.

Shuttle buses are available from Howard to Wilson to provide connecting service through the affected area. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
